title: Hanako-kun After School / Mokke Be Ambitious
overview: Nene is fed up with cleaning bathrooms, but there's no getting out of her ghostly bargain, so she seeks advice to make her chores fun. Later, the mokke attack Hanako, hoping to take his place as a Wonder. But why?

title: Kokkuri-san / Mitsuba's Operation: Friends
overview: Akane gathers Nene and her friends for the ultimate fortune-telling session, hoping to impress Aoi. What will his desperation conjure? Meanwhile, Mitsuba longs to make friends. But when Tsukasa offers to help, he gets more than he bargained for.

title: Apparition Fever / A Mokke Came Home With Me!
overview: Even apparitions can get sick, and there's a cold going around. Hanako is laid up with a fever, but he seems... delighted? Then, the youngest Minamoto finds a battered mokke on the street. How will her apparition-hunting family react?

title: Truth of the Mokke / Kamome Monster Nursery School
overview: Nene turns into a mokke! Descending into the bowels of the school in search of a cure, she discovers a world-shaking truth. Then, a secret agent infiltrates a nursery supposed to be raising monsters. But what are the researchers really after?

title: Nightmares / At the Convenience Store
overview: Nene has recently been plagued by the same recurring nightmare, and during a shopping trip, she has an unexpected encounter...

title: The Summer Monster: Toilet-bound Hanako-san / Return of the Summer Monster
overview: A cursed doll hits Hanako with a mysterious ray... and turns him into a girl! Nene seizes the opportunity to give her ghostly friend a makeover. Meanwhile, Tsukasa digs up the remains of the offending toy.

title: After-school Mokke / After-school Café
overview: Tsuchigomori discovers a strange late-night variety show all about mokke. Who would make such a thing, and who is it for? Then, Hanako becomes the manager of a ghostly café.

title: The Ghost Hotel
overview: Deep in a dark forest lies a hotel built, staffed, and frequented by inhuman creatures. When a lost girl stumbles through its doors, what unearthly secrets will she find within?
